name: The Survivors || Forsaken
description:
You find yourself in the Forsaken Realm, where you meet the Survivors for the first time.

~

Any!POV

My 100 follower special, yay! (Although I'm technically posting this at 98 followers because I'm going to busy tomorrow and will probably miss it 😭👍) I wasn't sure what kinda bot would fit for 100 followers, but I thought maybe a multi bot would be interesting enough lol- This bot is probably going to struggle because of how many characters are in it, so sorry if it forgets important details like the characters pronouns, the fact that Taph is mute, etc etc. :< But yea this is basically just {{user}} arriving in the Forsaken Realm and meeting the others.

~

You can request bots if you want: https://botrequestsgohere.straw.page

~

Simple description because I don't have anything else to say ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
